case_title: INNOCENT OKORONKWO VS. EDUARDO PANIAGUA ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR BLESSING OKORONKWO AS TO DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDUARDO ASTURIAS, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY EXCEPT DEFENDANT ELENA ASTURIAS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ARRIVED AT 10:25AM THEN THE DEFENDANT HAD ALREADY LEFT THE COURTROOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF SC-150 REQUEST TO POSTPONE FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR BLESSING OKORONKWO
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR BLESSING OKORONKWO
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-12-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-13-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED NOV-14-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDUARDO
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. THE COURT ORDERS THAT INNOCENT OKORONKWO IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR:BLESSING OKORONKWO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED NOV-21-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ASTURIAS, ELENA
